text.title: auto-evict-tool-results Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for auto-evict-tool-results as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Asking the LLM, in the system prompt, to "summarize tool outputs longer than 20k tokens before continuing".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model has already seen the 35k tokens by the time it can summarize — context damage is done. Eviction must happen before the message reaches the model.

failure-mode.description: Hard-coding the threshold equal to the model's max context window.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Effective context (where accuracy holds) is far smaller than advertised — see the MECW paper. Set the threshold to a fraction of the working budget per step (e.g. 10–20% of the per-turn budget), not the model's nominal limit.

failure-mode.description: System prompt instructs: "If a tool returns more than ~10k tokens, summarize and continue." No middleware enforces it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The full payload is in context the moment the tool returns; the summary that comes after cannot un-pollute earlier turns. Compaction must be a runtime guarantee, not a prompt request.

failure-mode.description: Middleware truncates tool output to first 500 chars and drops the remainder. No path, no scratch file.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The agent later realises it needs line 4,200 of the log and has no way to retrieve it — task fails or burns turns re-running the tool. Eviction without a path is just truncation.

failure-mode.description: Threshold set to 500 tokens "to be safe". Every tool result becomes a manifest the agent must dereference.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Doubles tool calls, wastes turns, raises latency. The threshold must be tuned to median tool result size; LangChain's empirical default of 20,000 is a sane starting point. Measure your own distribution and pick the 90th percentile.
